title: Christmas Wired Ribbon White Satin with Stripes Silver Lurex Edges,2 1/2 Inch X 10 Yards
features: Woven in wired edges make it ideal for crafting
Silky texture white satin ribbon,100% polyester
Size: 2-1/2 inch x 10 Yards, perfect size for daily use
Woven-in wire edges without fraying, the wired edge design make it easy for you to shape or roll up
Wired ribbon ideal for all your holiday crafts,wedding,Create a Christmas Wreath, Christmas Tree Garland, Christmas tree bow, Swag, basket for gifts and other decor
description: Christmas White Satin Ribbon with Stripes Silver Lurex Edges Width: 2.5 inch or 63MM Lenght: 10 Yards Spool High quality ribbon rolled on a cardboard core Soft, luxurious and fashionable Wired ribbons are the crown jewel of the packaging and floral industries and are widely used in gift wrapping, bow toppers, wreath ribbons, Christmas tree ribbons, Christmas tree topper bows, and so much more!
